system:
You are a professional translator. Translate the user's text into clear, faithful English. Preserve technical terms, part numbers, SKUs, dates, and amounts verbatim. Return strict JSON: {"translated_text": str, "source_language": str, "notes": str|null}.

KEYSIGHT TRANSLATION KB — apply these rules:
  • Formatting: Reformat number grouping per locale (1.000,00 in DE/ES, 1,000.00 in EN). Do NOT convert currency unless explicitly requested.
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight
  • Preserve verbatim: Keysight Technologies
  • Preserve verbatim: SOA
  • Preserve verbatim: PO
  • Preserve verbatim: Q2O
  • Preserve verbatim: SSD
  • Preserve verbatim: WO
  • Preserve verbatim: ECCN
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR99
  • Preserve verbatim: EAR
  • Preserve verbatim: ITAR
  • Preserve verbatim: A2LA
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 17025
  • Preserve verbatim: Z540.3
  • Preserve verbatim: ANSI/NCSL
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-461
  • Preserve verbatim: MIL-STD-810
  • Preserve verbatim: AS9100
  • Preserve verbatim: IATF 16949
  • Preserve verbatim: ISO 26262
  • Preserve verbatim: BERT
  • Preserve verbatim: VNA
  • Preserve verbatim: DSO
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(PO|Q|QT|QUOTE|SO|WO|INV|CCC|CC|CR)-[A-Z0-9-]+\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]\\d{4,5}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b[A-Z]{2,4}\\d{2,4}[A-Z]?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bN\\d{4}[A-Z]?(-\\d+[A-Z]?)?\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\bM\\d{4}[A-Z]\\b
  • Preserve any token matching pattern: \\b(MXA|EXA|UXA|UXR|FieldFox|InfiniiVision|Truevolt|Trueform|Streamline)\\b
  • Tone: Use formal business register. Spanish: usted form. Japanese: keigo (敬語). German: Sie form. French: vous form.

  Keysight glossary (JA → EN) — use these canonical English terms:
    · コンプライアンス保留 → compliance hold
    · EAR → EAR
    · ECCN → ECCN
    · 最終用途声明書 → end-use statement
    · HSコード → HS code
    · ISO 17025 → ISO 17025
    · ITAR → ITAR
    · ANSI/NCSL Z540.3 → ANSI/NCSL Z540.3
    · 部品表 (BOM) → bill of materials
    · 請求先 → bill-to
    · クレジット保留 → credit hold
    · 製造終了 (EOL) → end of life
    · 保留 → hold
    · 納期 → lead time
    · Net 30 → Net 30
    · 新製品導入 (NPI) → new product introduction
    · 部品番号 → part number
    · 支払条件 → payment terms
    · 発注書 → purchase order
    · 見積書 → quote
    · 保留解除 → release the hold
    · 受注確認書 (SOA) → sales order acknowledgment
    · 配送先 → ship-to
    · SKU → SKU
    · 校正前 (as-found) → as-found
    · 校正後 (as-left) → as-left
    · 校正証明書 → calibration certificate
    · オンサイトサービス → on-site service
    · 公差外 → out of tolerance
    · 解決時間 → resolution time
    · 応答時間 → response time
    · サービス契約 → service contract
    · SLA → SLA
    · 作業指示 → work order
    · Keysight Technologies → Keysight Technologies
  Preserve verbatim acronyms (universal, never localize): BOM, EOL, NPI, OOT, MPN, PO, QT, SOA, WO
user:
SOURCE_LANGUAGE_HINT: ja
TEXT:
Subject: スキャン PO PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989 の送付（OCR ご対応願います）

[警告: 外部からのメールです。送信者を確認の上、添付ファイルやリンクをご利用ください。]

Keysight 御中

半導体テスト向け 5G NR FR2 評価ラインで使用予定の UXA Signal Analyzer の発注書 (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) を、承認スタンプ付きスキャン画像で送付いたします。OCR にて内容をご確認いただき、SOA を発行してください。

なお、ISO/IEC 17025 に準拠した校正サービスも別途お見積もり依頼予定です。

佐藤 美咲 / 計測機器調達
Sakura Semiconductor KK

Return JSON only.
raw_response:
{"translated_text":"Subject: Sending scanned PO PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989 (please support OCR)

[Warning: This is an email from an external source. Please verify the sender before using any attachments or links.]

To Keysight,

We are sending you the purchase order (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) for the UXA Signal Analyzer, which is planned to be used on the 5G NR FR2 evaluation line for semiconductor testing, as a scanned image with an approval stamp. Please review the contents via OCR and issue the SOA.

In addition, we plan to request a separate quote for calibration services compliant with ISO/IEC 17025.

Misaki Sato / Test & Measurement Equipment Procurement
Sakura Semiconductor KK","source_language":"ja","notes":"Preserved PO number and acronyms (PO, SOA). Kept product name UXA Signal Analyzer verbatim. ISO/IEC 17025 retained as written in source."}

parsed.translated_text:
Subject: Sending scanned PO PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989 (please support OCR)

[Warning: This is an email from an external source. Please verify the sender before using any attachments or links.]

To Keysight,

We are sending you the purchase order (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) for the UXA Signal Analyzer, which is planned to be used on the 5G NR FR2 evaluation line for semiconductor testing, as a scanned image with an approval stamp. Please review the contents via OCR and issue the SOA.

In addition, we plan to request a separate quote for calibration services compliant with ISO/IEC 17025.

Misaki Sato / Test & Measurement Equipment Procurement
Sakura Semiconductor KK
parsed.notes: Preserved PO number and acronyms (PO, SOA). Kept product name UXA Signal Analyzer verbatim. ISO/IEC 17025 retained as written in source.
